profile_summary.name: Olimbek N.
profile_summary.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer| Python & Go | Backend & AI Development
profile_summary.overview: I help companies, startups, and educators turn documents, courses, PDFs, videos, and internal knowledge into reliable AI systems using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Most freelancers connect an LLM and stop; I design the entire AI architecture so the system is accurate, fast, secure, and usable by real users. Specialized in Educational AI, RAG orchestration, and high-performance backend infrastructure.
